prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KIDS-BASEBALL-SET-ASSRT-KPKO Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 1pk Sports Toys Baseball Gear with Plastic Bat and Balls Playset, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Introduce your little slugger to America’s favorite pastime, baseball. This fun set is great busy and active kids and comes four plastic balls. When practice time or game time is over, the soft baseballs can be easily stored by untwisting the bat and placing the baseballs within the bat, making it great for small space storage indoors or out, and keeps all the pieces together, ensuring baseballs aren’t lost along the way.

The soft grip baseball bat and baseballs are made of lightweight, non-toxic plastic, and are the perfect grip size for small kids and even toddlers, designed with little hands in mind. The hollowed out interior of both the bat and balls allow for your little slugger to practice powerful swings and strong throws, without fear of injury or damage to themselves, friends or nearby surroundings. Perfect for toddlers and small children’s baseball swing and batting practice.

This fun baseball playset will have your child going pro in no time. And while it’s all fun and games, parents will love that kids and even toddlers are also developing and improving hand eye coordination, as well as fine and gross motor skills when playing.

Kids will love swinging for the stands with this great sports toys baseball gear playset from Kidplokio; batter up.

NOTE: Colors (orange, blue or green) ship assorted Search Terms: Kids toddlers baseball gear sports toys birthday present active kids toys brother Hanukkah Christmas gifts busy kids activity fine motor skills baseball bat playroom holiday toy list 2022 hand eye coordination training outdoor games summer stocking Features: - PLEASE NOTE: Colors ship at random (blue, orange or green) - KIDS BASEBALL PLAYSET: Introduce your little slugger to America’s favorite game, baseball! This fun set is great busy and active kids and comes four plastic balls and a plastic baseball bat that doubles as ball storage when the sports toys are not in use - PLASTIC BASEBALL BAT: The soft grip baseball bat and balls are made of lightweight and non toxic plastic, with a hollowed out interior of both the bat and ball that allow for added safety; little athletes in training practice powerful swings without the fear of injury or damage, and makes swinging for the stands easier too! - FINE MOTOR TOYS: This fun baseball gear kids playset will have little ones going pro in no time! And while it’s all fun and games, parents will love that kids and even toddlers are also developing and improving hand eye coordination, as well as fine and gross motor skills when playing - BASEBALLS STORAGE: When practice time or game time is over, the baseball gear playset can be easily stored by untwisting the bat and placing the baseballs within the plastic baseball bat, making for easy small space storage indoors or out, and ensures no soft baseballs are lost along the way === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
